Keep review undecided and acceptance blocked pending explicit Operator disposition; use no SDK, network, credentials, account or trading API; leave GAP-095 open; and create no provider selection, venue selection, realtime activation, data promotion, mark or index authority, signal, product, P48, wallet, account, balance, position, order, execution, tag, release, or deployment authority.
proposals.title: BTC Coin Metrics reference-rate mandatory Operator review packet

proposals.summary: Preserve exact registered Guojin QMT terminal-observed and local-cache single-call-failed evidence, defer MiniQMT as non-blocking, and continue A-share research through the existing registered QMT local-export workflow. Keep RQData trial and Tushare as unselected candidate supplements, require batch registration, coverage validation, and independent reconciliation, preserve GAP-093 through GAP-109, perform no retry or network access, and create no provider selection, promotion, realtime, product, account, order, execution, P48, tag, release, or deployment authority.
proposals.title: A-share QMT local-export non-blocking continuity routing

proposals.summary: Add one registered-artifact-only read-only factor registry runtime over the completed V2-R11 foundation. Verify exact ASCII JSON bytes and closed schema, expose immutable record and dependency views, resolve deterministic topological order, and propagate retirement invalidation without calculation, scoring, promotion, external data, account, order, execution, P48, tag, release, or deployment authority.
proposals.title: Registered factor registry read-only runtime

proposals.summary: Add one registered-artifact-only read-only forecast-target and outcome-label definition registry runtime over the completed V2-R1 foundation. Verify exact ASCII JSON bytes and closed schema, expose immutable target and label record hashes plus bidirectional lineage, and preserve target selection, label materialization, outcome calculation, scoring, promotion, external data, account, order, execution, P48, tag, release, and deployment as forbidden.
proposals.title: Registered forecast-target and label definition runtime

proposals.summary: Add one registered-artifact-only read-only multi-anchor State-Sync Lock runtime over the completed V2-R1 foundation. Verify exact ASCII JSON bytes, anchor hashes, per-instrument sequence monotonicity, expiry, supersession, and current locks without state mutation, external data, calculation, scoring, account, order, execution, P48, tag, release, or deployment authority.
proposals.title: Registered State-Sync Lock read-only runtime
